sections.paragraph:
σκωρία, ας, ἡ (Aristot. et al.; Strabo 9, 1, 23; Sym.) refuse produced when metal is smelted, slag, dross, Hv 4, 3, 4.—DELG s.v. σκῶρ.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 933
